The '''''Dragon Queen''''' was [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka's]] personal [[Hapan Battle Dragon]].

==History==
It served as her [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], in the battles of [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Hapes]] and [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Kashyyyk]]. It also appeared during the [[Battle of Uroro Station|battle over Shedu Maad]], where a [[nanovirus]] was released on it to kill all of those with Hapan Royal Blood. Though the assassination attempt resulted in the deaths of many of ''Dragon Queen''{{'s}} crew members, it failed to kill the Queen Mother or her [[Allana Djo Solo|daughter]]—the primary targets—thanks to a doomed [[Darth Caedus]] warning them through the Force at the last minute.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''
